---
title: "GemCity.TECH"
---

## Mission Brief

```bash
com·mu·ni·ty
2. a feeling of fellowship with others, as a result of sharing common attitudes, interests, and goals.
```
{{< include _markdown/mission_statement.md >}}


## Save the Date

### [Mini Conference](https://www.meetup.com/gem-city-tech/events/312652762): April 25th, 2026
### [Summer Picnic](https://www.meetup.com/gem-city-tech/events/312652809/?slug=gem-city-tech&eventId=312652809): July 25th, 2026
### [Holiday Potlock](https://www.meetup.com/gem-city-tech/events/312652850/): Dec. 3rd, 2026

## Mini Conference: April 25th, 2026

[**Register Here**](https://www.meetup.com/gem-city-tech/events/312652762)

Join GemCITY.TECH for a comprehensive mini conference covering the entire software development lifecycle! Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting your tech journey, this event will provide valuable insights into every stage of building great software.

### What We'll Cover

* 🎯 **Product Ownership**  Taylor Luehrs, PMP
  What the Customer Actually Meant: Product Ownership and Translating Requirements Into Real Software
* 👥 **Teaming**: Resolving the I in Team, Speaker: Evelyn J. Boettcher  
  How does one work well within a team or build a new team?  The initial step is being able to see the I's in the team. We need to work effectively in a team and understand the true goals of our customers. However, one can not do that without knowing ourselves, our limits, and how people interpret the world.  This is where being able to see the I in the team, allows one to get 
big things done.
* Lunch provided by Astero Engineering
* 🎨 **UX & Accessibility**  Ren Estep
  Don't Get Stuck in a Toxic Situationship:
Building Web Experiences for Every Context  
* ⚙️ **DevOps**  Sunny Kolattukody
   Dry in the Age of AI
* 💡 **Side Hustles**  
  Turning your tech skills into additional opportunities and passion projects.

This is a fantastic opportunity to connect with the Dayton tech community, learn from experienced practitioners, and gain a holistic view of modern software development.
More details on speakers, schedule, and registration coming soon!  

See you on April 25th! 🚀
 

![Speakers for Mini Conference](./img/GemCityTechMiniConference_April2026.png)




## What changed in 2026?

- Leadership:
  * Hanen Alkhafaji: President
  * Evelyn J. Boettcher: Vice President



## Our family of user groups:

All user groups are free and open to the public. 

{{< include _markdown/groups.md >}}

### Meeting Location

Currently, almost meetings are at the Innovation Hub at the Downtown Dayton Arcade Building.
Exception

* Summer picnic.  The picnic is held at a local park.
* Winter Game night. Local bar

#### The Innovation Hub
31 South Main Street Dayton, OH

## Connect With Us

[<img src="img/logo/meetup-logo-script.png" alt="Meetup logo with link to GemCity TECH event calendar on Meetup" style="width: 9vw; margin-right: 20px;" />](https://www.meetup.com/gem-city-tech) <span style="font-size: xxx-large;">|</span>
  [<img src="img/logo/Discord-Logo+Wordmark-Color.png" alt="Discord logo with link to GemCity TECH Discord server" style="width: 10vw; margin-right: 20px;" />](https://discord.gg/tseSTARJas) <span style="font-size: xxx-large;">|</span> 
  [<img src="img/logo/LI-Logo.png" alt="Linkedin logo with link to GemCity TECH Linkedin profile" style="width: 10vw; margin-right: 20px;" />](https://www.linkedin.com/company/gemcitytech)
